name: Cabbage Rolls with Sauerkraut & Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook cabbage leaves in a small amount of boiling salted water for 3-4 minutes.
2. Drain and dry on paper towels.
3. Mix rice, sausage meat, onion, salt, and pepper.
4. Fill and roll the cabbage leaves with the mixture.
5. Place half of sauerkraut in a skillet.
6. Top with cabbage rolls and pork hock.
7. Cover with remaining sauerkraut.
8. Add enough water to cover; simmer for 2 hours, adding more water when needed.
9. Sprinkle with paprika before serving.
10. Makes 6-8 servings.
